SELF-SERVE · PILOT

Statement of Work — Paid Pilot

Change Risk Radar  ·  90-Day Pilot Program  ·  Effective: 2026-04-05

Start pilot →

1. Parties

Vendor: Change Risk Radar ("CRR"), operated by the founding team at change-risk-radar.com

Customer: The company accepting this SOW via the onboarding flow at change-risk-radar.vercel.app ("Customer")

By enabling a paid subscription, Customer agrees to the terms of this SOW in conjunction with the Change Risk Radar Terms of Service and Data Processing Addendum.

2. Pilot Scope

This SOW governs a 90-day paid pilot of the Change Risk Radar platform. The pilot includes:

ItemStarter PilotGrowth Pilot
Term90 days90 days
Monthly fee$500 USD$1,500 USD
Connectors included25
Alerts/month5002,000
Users310
Notification channelsEmail + SlackAll channels
Alert history30 days90 days
Weekly briefs✓✓ + AI summaries
Priority supportEmailEmail < 24h SLA
Cancellation30-day notice30-day notice

3. Deliverables (Vendor)

  • Onboarding session (async walkthrough video + documentation)
  • Connector setup support via email within 2 business days
  • Weekly risk brief delivered every Monday by 9:00 AM Customer's local time
  • Alert delivery within 5 minutes of detection (p95 SLA)
  • Monthly pilot review report (PDF) at day 30, 60, and 90
  • SOC 2 Type II report (Growth tier) upon request

4. Customer Obligations

  • Provide valid credentials for at least one connector within 48 hours of signup
  • Designate a primary contact for onboarding and alert reviews
  • React to at least 5 alerts during the pilot period (for signal-quality feedback)
  • Respond to the 30-day check-in survey

5. Success Criteria

The pilot is considered successful if, within 90 days:

  • At least 1 relevant change is detected that Customer would not have caught independently
  • Alert engagement rate (reactions / total alerts) ≥ 30%
  • Customer confirms the weekly brief reduces manual monitoring time

If success criteria are not met through platform performance failures, Customer is eligible for a pro-rated credit.

6. Pricing & Payment

  • Starter: $500/month billed monthly, or $1,350/quarter (save 10%), or $4,800/year (save 20%)
  • Growth: $1,500/month billed monthly, or $4,050/quarter (save 10%), or $14,400/year (save 20%)
  • Payment via Stripe (credit card, ACH debit, or wire for annual plans)
  • Net-30 invoicing available for annual Growth/Enterprise contracts
  • All amounts in USD. Taxes (if applicable) billed separately.

7. Data & Security

  • Customer data is stored in Supabase (PostgreSQL) with row-level security by organization
  • Connector credentials are stored encrypted at rest (AES-256)
  • CRR never stores customer payment card data (Stripe PCI DSS Level 1)
  • All API traffic encrypted in transit (TLS 1.2+)
  • Data Processing Addendum (GDPR Art. 28) available at change-risk-radar.vercel.app/legal/dpa
  • Security documentation available at /pilot/security

8. Intellectual Property

Customer retains all rights to their data. CRR retains all rights to the platform, detection algorithms, and rule engine. Aggregated, anonymized signal data (with no PII) may be used to improve detection quality.

9. Cancellation & Termination

  • Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice
  • CRR will export Customer data within 10 business days of termination request
  • Data is retained for 30 days post-termination, then deleted
  • No refunds for partial months on monthly plans; pro-rated credit for annual plans

10. Limitation of Liability

CRR's liability is limited to the fees paid in the 3 months preceding the claim. CRR is not liable for decisions made based on alert content, missed changes due to connector misconfiguration, or third-party platform downtime.

11. Governing Law

This SOW is governed by the laws of California, USA. Disputes are resolved by binding arbitration under AAA rules.

Acceptance

By clicking “Start pilot →” or enabling a paid subscription, Customer electronically agrees to this SOW, the Terms of Service, and the Data Processing Addendum. For countersigned PDFs or custom SOW terms, contact legal@change-risk-radar.com.

Accept & start pilot →Request custom terms

© 2025 Change Risk Radar · Early Access · All deposits 100% refundable
